MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-05-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS JOHN VOTRUBA AND TERESA VOTRUBA'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. PARTIES TO FIRST MAKE EFFORTS TO MEDIATE, AND ARBITRATE. PARTIES TO SUBMIT 3 NAMES OF ARIBRATORS TO EACH OTHER, EACH SIDE CAN CROSS OFF UP TO 2 NAMES. SUBMIT TO COURT FOR FINAL SELECTION FROM REMAINING NAMES ON LIST. ARBITRATOR TO DECIDE ATTORNEY'S FEES, IF ANY. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: LYNN O'MALLEY TAYLOR, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-05-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
George Benetatos, esq. (415-203-2296) for Plaintiff/opposing party Duane L. Frisbie.
P. Terry Anderlini, esq. (650-212-0001) for Defendants/Moving party JOHN VOTRUBA and TERESA VOTRUBA.

ARGUED re: TIC agreement; mediation and arbitration efforts. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs JOHN VOTRUBA and TERESA VOTRUBA's Petition To Compel Arbitration is GRANTED. Parties to first make efforts to mediate, and arbitrate. Parties to submit 3 names of arbitrators to each other, each side can cross off up to 2 names. Submit to Court for final selection from remaining names on list. Arbitrator to decide attorney's fees, if any. Defendant's Counsel to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
